title: Karl Tabbakh appointed Chair of Invest in Canada by the Honourable Mary Ng
content:
## Karl Tabbakh appointed Chair of Invest in Canada by the Honourable Mary Ng
September 23, 2022 – McCarthy Tétrault congratulates Karl Tabbakh , Regional Managing Partner for Québec and Co-Leader of the Firm’s International & Business Strategy, on his appointment as Chair of Invest in Canada . The announcement was made by the Honourable Mary Ng , Minister of International Trade, Export Promotion, Small Business and Economic Development.
Invest in Canada is the country’s global investment attraction and promotion agency, bringing together industry, community and government partners to unlock investment and expansion opportunities in Canada for global businesses. Karl’s nomination is a true reflection of his extensive international experience, deep business acumen, unique relationship-building skills and commitment to delivering exceptional results and innovative business solutions to clients.
“ It is clear to me that foreign investment should be at the core of Canada’s economic growth strategy,” Karl says. “As the new Chair of Invest in Canada, I look forward to continuing to grow Canada’s brand on the international stage, bring strategic projects to Canada, and foster innovative business relations that will contribute to our country’s prosperity. ”
A business leader, corporate lawyer and strategic advisor, Karl has held numerous leadership roles within the Canadian business community.
Karl’s practice focuses on private equity, mergers and acquisitions, securities and capital markets. He has led and participated in the negotiation and structuring of some of the most high-profile and strategically critical transactions in Canada, the Middle East and globally. He will continue to act as Regional Managing Partner for Québec, Co-Leader of the Firm’s International & Business Strategy and will continue his practice.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London. Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
